Would be nice to have the header re-organization done in a separate patch. Both adding a header and reorganizing them makes it potentially harder to cherry-pick this commit.

Patch Set 3:

Chris: I'm treating the header reorgs like code indentation.  They'll never be done unless you proactively do them while you're in there.

commit.subject: LU-6401 headers:  Create a header for obdo related functions
commit.message:
LU-6401 headers:  Create a header for obdo related functions

Remove all obdo related functions from lustre_idl.h
Create lustre_odbo.h
Include where appropriate, reorganize #include blocks

Signed-off-by: Ben Evans <bevans@cray.com>
Change-Id: I35646ba27a0903bbb64281ad49fd650b10f71d7b
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/16917
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@yahoo.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
